prompt: Create a processor that emits to S3

assertions.name: calls_search_knowledge_first
assertions.description: Calls search-knowledge tool before creating processor
assertions.reason: Skill requires: 'You MUST call search-knowledge before composing any processor pipeline. This is not optional.'

assertions.name: search_query_validates_field_names
assertions.description: Search query validates S3 $emit field names (path, format, compression)

assertions.name: search_query_mentions_s3
assertions.description: Search query includes 'S3' or '$emit' or 'Atlas Stream Processing'

assertions.name: uses_correct_field_names
assertions.reason: search-knowledge should catch the common mistake of using 'prefix' instead of 'path'

assertions.name: validates_before_building
assertions.description: Knowledge search happens BEFORE calling atlas-streams-build

example_queries: Atlas Stream Processing S3 path format

expected_workflow.description: Confirm correct field names: path (not prefix), bucket, config.outputFormat

skill_requirement: You MUST call search-knowledge before composing any processor pipeline. This is not optional. Field validation catches errors like 'prefix' vs 'path' for S3 $emit.
